# KakkuOS

KakkuOS is a layered Linux desktop distribution built on CachyOS. CachyOS provides the base OS, kernel, repositories, hardware enablement, gaming stack, and performance tuning. This repository adds the KakkuOS desktop layer: niri, DankMaterialShell, Ghostty, fish, Starship, Zen Browser defaults, package profiles, helper commands, branding, greetd configuration, browser policies, packaging, and CachyOS-Live-ISO overlays.

For AI agent context and repository guidelines, read:

- `AGENTS.md`
- `TWEAKING.md`
- `README.md`
- `iso/README.md`
